commands.review_summary:
The PR bounds six MiniMax success-path JSON response reads under 1 MiB across image generation, OAuth authorization, TTS, and video generation providers.

PR surface: Source +38. Total +38 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main has unbounded MiniMax success-response `response.json()` reads on the changed provider paths. I did not run a live MiniMax API call or local harness in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The patch needs author-visible code/test changes and contributor real behavior proof; automation can repair code, but it cannot provide proof from the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(minimax): bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit` (1 MiB cap)
across MiniMax video/tts/oauth/image-generation providers (6 call sites in 4 files) —
the symmetric counterpart to bound-stream work in #95420, #95417, #95218.

The video-generation module already uses `readResponseWithLimit` for video downloads,
but the JSON API response paths (status query, metadata, submit, TTS, OAuth, image)
were still unbounded, allowing a malicious/faulty MiniMax API endpoint to trigger
unbounded buffering.

## Evidence

- **Static checks**: `npx oxlint` exits 0 on changed files; `git diff --check` clean
- **Existing coverage**: `readResponseWithLimit` is already imported and tested in
  the video-generation module — this fix extends the same guard to the 3 JSON
  response sites and adds it to the 3 other modules
- **Negative control**: reverting any of the 6 JSON reads back to `await response.json()`
  would allow an oversized streamed body to buffer without bound
- **Prior art**: follows pattern from #95420, #95417, #95418, #95218

## Summary

Bound 6 unbounded JSON response reads in MiniMax providers with 1 MiB cap.

## Changes

- **`extensions/minimax/video-generation-provider.ts`** — bound status query, metadata,
  and submit response reads (3 call sites)
- **`extensions/minimax/tts.ts`** — bound TTS API JSON response read
- **`extensions/minimax/oauth.ts`** — bound OAuth authorization JSON response read
- **`extensions/minimax/image-generation-provider.ts`** — bound image API JSON
  response read
target.author: lsr911
